narration_text: Now we'll see how the traditional seven OSI layers can be expanded upon. Notice that the image on your slide illustrates additional layers, providing a more detailed view of network communication. Look at the diagram on your slide — notice how the nodes at each level interact with those above and below, forming a complex hierarchy. This expansion helps us better understand the intricacies of data transmission and reception. I want you to focus on how these extra layers fit into the overall framework, as this will help clarify the flow of data between devices. As we examine this expanded model, let's think about this together and see how it prepares us to dive deeper into network architecture.
